ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Two-letter abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state */,
  "geographic_area" REAL /* Geographic area of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistic record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the crime statistics are recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime statistics were recorded */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., violent, property) */,
  "crime_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the crime */,
  "murder_rate" REAL /* Rate of murder per 100,000 population */,
  "assault_rate" REAL /* Rate of assault per 100,000 population */,
  "rape_rate" REAL /* Rate of rape per 100,000 population */,
  "victim_count" INTEGER /* Number of victims involved in the crime */,
  "perpetrator_count" INTEGER /* Number of perpetrators involved in the crime */,
  "arrest_rate" REAL /* Percentage of crimes that resulted in arrests */,
  "conviction_rate" REAL /* Percentage of crimes that resulted in convictions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_population" (
  "pop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban population record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the urban population data is recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the urban population data was recorded */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Percentage of the state's population living in urban areas */,
  "urban_area" REAL /* Land area of urbanized areas within the state */,
  "urban_population_growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of change in urban population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urban_population_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socioeconomic data record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the socioeconomic data is recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the socioeconomic data was recorded */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the state */,
  "high_school_graduation_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population with a high school diploma */,
  "bachelor_degree_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population with a bachelor's degree */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average level of education (e.g., high school, bachelor's degree) */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living below the poverty line */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median value of homes in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, law enforcement, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_table" TEXT /* Name of the table being accessed */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "data_columns" TEXT /* Specific columns of data that were accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "hist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the historical data is recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the historical data was recorded */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., violent, property) */,
  "crime_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the crime */,
  "murder_rate" REAL /* Rate of murder per 100,000 population */,
  "assault_rate" REAL /* Rate of assault per 100,000 population */,
  "rape_rate" REAL /* Rate of rape per 100,000 population */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Percentage of the state's population living in urban areas */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
